sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63819" key="loidorhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοιδορ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n63819.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must rail at</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
